name: Marinated Cucumber
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the cucumbers with the tines of a fork.
2. Cut into very thin slices.
3. Sprinkle with salt and chill for 2 hours, draining well.
4. Sprinkle with sugar replacement, add vinegar, and pepper.
5. Marinate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Food Exchange per serving: NEGLIGIBLE CALORIES
NEGLIGIBLE
